title: Jpk's BVW
description: This is a Vanilla wolf texture pack that changes the look of the wolves to make then slightly more realistic!
body:
This pack changes the wolf textures and models to make them more realistic and clean! while still leaving them with that OG mc wolf feel! 

_**NOTE**_

This pack needs either oprifine or EMF to run 

Hope you enjoy! :D 
~Jpk131
